evals.prompt: Add a 'score' integer field to the Contact model in Prisma and create a migration
evals.expected_output: Updated schema.prisma with score field, migration file created
expectations: The schema.prisma file is modified to include a score field on the Contact model
A new migration is created in prisma/migrations/
The field has a sensible default value

evals.prompt: Create a new API endpoint GET /api/contacts/overdue that returns contacts past their nextDue date
evals.expected_output: New route.ts file with GET handler filtering by nextDue
expectations: A new file is created at src/app/api/contacts/overdue/route.ts
The endpoint uses validateApiKey for auth
The Prisma query filters for kitActive: true, archived: false, nextDue lte now
Results are ordered by nextDue ascending

evals.prompt: The sync endpoint is returning 500 errors when contacts have duplicate phone numbers. Fix the upsert logic.
evals.expected_output: Updated sync route.ts with better dedup handling
expectations: The fix is applied to src/app/api/contacts/sync/route.ts
Duplicate phone numbers are handled gracefully without 500 errors
The existing findFirst OR logic is improved
